# Synastral

Synastral (https://synastral.com/) is a free birth chart generator. Enter
your date, time, and place of birth, then generate a full natal wheel with
houses, aspects, and placements. It is customisable, free to use, and has
no account or email gate. The chart generator above doesn't store your
birth details.

## Kate

Kate has practised Tropical Western + Traditional/Hellenistic astrology for
4+ years. She uses Placidus if you were born on or around the equator, and
Whole Sign if you were born far north or south.

## Readings

Full readings are available via https://ko-fi.com/slideshowastrology.

## Shop

Gallery-grade poster prints, year-ahead planners, and natal chart
interpretations are available via https://www.etsy.com/shop/synastralco.

## Contact

kate@synastral.com
